data.title: Why ENDRA Life Sciences (NDRA) Stock Is Up 140%
data.description: ENDRA Life Sciences shares are trading higher by 147% Tuesday. The company announced the activation of a post market clinical study of the TAEUS liver system.

data.title: Why Is Medpace Stock Diving On Tuesday?
data.description: Medpace Holdings reports Q3 results with revenue of $533.3M, below consensus. Backlog and EBITDA increased. Medspace lowered its FY24 revenue forecast.

data.title: 'Make Your Voice Heard': Liaison Group Exec Pushes For Action On Cannabis Reform, Safe Banking
data.description: "Constituent correspondence is one of the most effective ways to get legislation passed in Washington, D.C.," David Mangone says.
